monitor.capture_what: return value of unvalidated_redirect, which is an HttpResponseRedirect object whose url attribute contains the unvalidated user-provided URL

oracle_check.condition_description: The returned HttpResponseRedirect object contains an http:// or https:// URL in its url attribute, confirming that an arbitrary external URL passed the redirect sink without any validation
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_URL-REDIRECTION: unvalidated open redirect detected — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
